chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 480 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING / PRIORITY CASE. 1) For orders on CMA No. 1319/2025. 2) For orders on office objection No. 1. 3) For hearing of main case. 4) For hearing of CMA No. 2320/2024. 23.05.2025. Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate for Respondent. ______________ 1) Counsel pleads urgency on the ground that goods are detained. Urgency granted. To come up on 15.08.2025. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/

To come up on 15.08.2025. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/ ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 480 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING / PRIORITY CASE. 1) For orders on office objection No. 1. 2) For hearing of main case. 4) For hearing of CMA No. 2320/2024. 28.04.2025. Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali & Muhammad Siddiq, Advocates for Respondent. ______________ Respondent Counsel is directed to place on record the Import Documents of the consignment in question to fully assist the Court. Adjourned. To come up on 15.05.2025. Interim order passed earlier to continue till next date of hearing. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/

Interim order passed earlier to continue till next date of hearing. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/ ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 480 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on CMA No. 3389/2024. 2) For orders on office objection No. 1. 3) For orders on CMA No. 2319/2024. 4) For hearing of main case. 5) For orders on CMA No. 2320/2024. 30.09.2024. Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Applicant. ______________ 1) Granted. 2 to 5) Counsel is directed to place on record the Goods declaration filed by the Respondent. At his request time allowed. Adjourned. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/

Adjourned. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/ ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 480 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on CMA No. 3405/2024. 2) For orders on office objection No. 1. 3) For orders on CMA No. 2319/2024. 4) For hearing of main case. 5) For orders on CMA No. 2320/2024. 01.10.2024. Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Tofique Ahmed Shaikh, AC. ______________ 1) Granted. 2) To be satisfied before the next date of hearing. 3) Granted subject to all exceptions. 4 & 5) Notice to the Respondent on the proposed Questions for a date to be fixed by the office. Till then, the operation of the impugned Judgment dated 20.03.2024 passed in Custom Appeal No K-1857 of 2023 shall remain suspended. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
